fields.name: Source_Sample
fields.description: 'Main' if the entry comes from the main catalog (Table 3, 683 X-ray sources) or 'Supp' if from the supplementary catalog (Table 6)

fields.name: Source_Number
fields.description: Sequential identification number for each source in the specified sample, in order of increasing J2000.0 RA

fields.name: Name
fields.description: Source name with prefix 'CXOU' and the J2000.0 position truncated to 0.1 s in RA and 1 arcsec in Declination

fields.name: RA
fields.description: Best-fit X-ray source Right Ascension (J2000.0)

fields.name: Dec
fields.description: Best-fit X-ray source Declination (J2000.0)

fields.name: Log_Prob_No_Src
fields.description: Minimum value of log P among the three standard bands, where P is the binomial no-source probability; main-catalog selection threshold log P < -2.4 (P < 0.004)

fields.name: Error_Radius
fields.description: X-ray positional uncertainty at the ~68% confidence level (0.10-2.2 arcsec, median 0.47)

fields.name: Off_Axis
fields.description: Off-axis angle (0.13-14.63 arcmin, median 6.01)

fields.name: FB_Counts
fields.description: Aperture-corrected net counts in the full band (0.5-7.0 keV); Kraft et al. (1991) 90% upper limits for non-detections

fields.name: SB_Counts
fields.description: Aperture-corrected net counts in the soft band (0.5-2.0 keV)

fields.name: HB_Counts
fields.description: Aperture-corrected net counts in the hard band (2.0-7.0 keV)

fields.name: OIR_Ctrpart_Catalog
fields.description: Catalog of the primary optical/NIR/MIR/radio (ONIR) counterpart: VLA, GOODS-N, CANDELS, Ks, CapakR/Yang14, or IRAC

fields.name: Spec_Redshift
fields.description: Secure spectroscopic redshift (351/670 ONIR-matched main sources)

fields.name: Phot_Redshift
fields.description: H-HDF-N photometric redshift from Yang et al. 2014 (612/670 = 91.3% of ONIR-matched main sources)

fields.name: Redshift
fields.description: Preferred redshift (zfinal), in order of preference: secure zspec, CANDELS/3D-HST zphot, H-HDF-N zphot

fields.name: Band_Ratio
fields.description: Hard-to-soft effective count-rate ratio

fields.name: Photon_Index
fields.description: Effective photon index Gamma for a power law with Galactic NH = 1.6e20 cm-2; Gamma = 1.4 assumed for low-count sources

fields.name: FB_Flux
fields.description: Observed-frame full-band flux, not corrected for Galactic or intrinsic absorption

fields.name: SB_Flux
fields.description: Observed-frame soft-band flux

fields.name: HB_Flux
fields.description: Observed-frame hard-band flux

fields.name: Lx
fields.description: Absorption-corrected, rest-frame 0.5-7 keV luminosity (H0 = 69.7 km/s/Mpc, OmegaM = 0.282, OmegaLambda = 0.718)

fields.name: Broad_Type
fields.description: 'AGN', 'Galaxy', or 'Star'; 591 (86.5%), 75 (11.0%), and 17 (2.5%) of the 683 main-catalog sources respectively

fields.name: A03_Source_Number
fields.description: Cross-match to the Alexander et al. 2003 catalog (487 matches in the 503-source A03 main catalog; 196 new sources)
